flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chandler-Gilbert Community College fell 33% between 2006 and 2009 (19.8% → 13.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Chandler-Gilbert Community College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3k → 5.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chandler-Gilbert Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chandler-Gilbert Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).
